title: DepMap dependency aggregator (CRISPR Chronos) + golden fixtures; pin release
context: Selective gene dependencies come from DepMap CRISPR (Chronos) gene-effect data. The project needs a deterministic aggregator that pins a specific public DepMap release and emits only CC-BY-permitted per-model summaries, referencing (never re-hosting) bulk source matrices. Standing guardrails bind this task: open-access sources only (no dbGaP/EGA/biobank/controlled-access); COSMIC/OncoKB are link-only; donor fields are published-only with no re-identification or external linkage; every assertion carries field-level provenance; the deliverable is de-identified research metadata, never patient data and never a clinical/therapeutic recommendation.
objective: Build the DepMap dependency aggregator that pins a release and emits per-model selective-dependency summaries with golden fixtures.
acceptanceCriteria: Pins a specific DepMap public release (recorded in compiledFromReleases); aggregates CRISPR gene-effect (Chronos) into per-model selective-dependency summaries.
DepMap release license verified to permit redistributable aggregates (gate-002 artifact); only CC-BY-permitted aggregates emitted; bulk source matrices referenced, not re-hosted.
Ships golden fixtures: synthetic gene-effect matrix -> expected summary; methodology + caveat attached to output. Code MIT; CI green; no credentials embedded.
resources: ICLAC Register of Misidentified Cell Lines
output: src/depmap/ dependency aggregator plus golden fixtures, green in CI (PR).
